_comment: Maps local .ipynb filenames to Fabric workspace/item IDs. Used by the notebook-deploy advisory hook.

spindle_eh_benchmark.ipynb.notes: MultiJSON streaming vs Parquet queued ingest benchmark

spindle_billion_demo.ipynb.notes: v2.5.0 Anchor API + MultiWriter billion-row demo

deploy_pattern.step1: Direct REST: POST /v1/workspaces/{ws}/items?format=ipynb with definition inline. MCP create_item returns 400 with definition param.
deploy_pattern.warning: source fields must be list of strings (splitlines(keepends=True)), NOT plain strings. LRO result has no item ID — list items after success.
